---
title: "Usage"
---

This page shows a few small, practical ways to use the published outputs.

## Download The Current Release

The links below are constructed from the latest generated release tag. They point to the release assets produced by the workflow.

<div id="download-links" class="summary-card">
  <p>Latest release links will appear here after the page loads.</p>
</div>

## Example: Read The Long CSV In Pandas

```python
import pandas as pd

release_tag = "ruks-2025-11-28"
date_part = release_tag.replace("ruks-", "")
url = (
    "https://github.com/steenhulthin/ruks-data/releases/download/"
    f"{release_tag}/ruks_hovedresultater_long-{date_part}.csv.gz"
)

df = pd.read_csv(url)

asthma = df[
    (df["disease_label"] == "astma")
    & (df["measure_code"] == "incidence")
    & (df["geo_level"] == "country")
    & (df["sex_code"] == "both")
    & (df["age_group_code"] == "alle-aldre")
    & (df["value_kind"] == "count")
]

print(asthma[["year", "value"]].head())
```

## Example: Query The SQLite Snapshot

```python
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect("ruks-2025-11-28.sqlite")

sql = """
select
  f.year,
  f.value
from fact_observation f
join dim_disease d on d.disease_id = f.disease_id
join dim_measure m on m.measure_id = f.measure_id
join dim_geography g on g.geography_id = f.geography_id
join dim_sex s on s.sex_id = f.sex_id
join dim_age_group a on a.age_group_id = f.age_group_id
join dim_unit u on u.unit_id = f.unit_id
where d.disease_slug = 'astma'
  and m.measure_code = 'incidence'
  and g.geo_level = 'country'
  and s.sex_code = 'both'
  and a.age_group_code = 'alle-aldre'
  and u.unit_code = 'count__persons__none'
order by f.year
"""

df = pd.read_sql_query(sql, conn)
print(df)
```

## Example: Static-Site Preview

Because the site is static, it does not load the full dataset into the browser. Instead, it uses a small generated JSON summary. The table below is rendered in the browser from `site/data/latest-summary.json` and shows national asthma incidence counts and rates.

<div id="series-preview" class="summary-card">
  <p>Example series preview will appear here after the page loads.</p>
</div>

<script>
function buildAssetLinks(data) {
  const base = `https://github.com/steenhulthin/ruks-data/releases/download/${data.release_tag}`;
  const datePart = data.release_tag.replace("ruks-", "");
  return [
    {
      label: "Long CSV (.csv.gz)",
      url: `${base}/ruks_hovedresultater_long-${datePart}.csv.gz`,
    },
    {
      label: "Long Parquet (.parquet)",
      url: `${base}/ruks_hovedresultater_long-${datePart}.parquet`,
    },
    {
      label: "SQLite (.sqlite)",
      url: `${base}/ruks-${datePart}.sqlite`,
    },
  ];
}

function renderDownloads(data) {
  const target = document.getElementById("download-links");
  const links = buildAssetLinks(data)
    .map((file) => `<li><a href="${file.url}">${file.label}</a></li>`)
    .join("");

  target.innerHTML = `
    <h3>${data.workbook_title}</h3>
    <p><strong>Release:</strong> <code>${data.release_tag}</code></p>
    <ul>${links}</ul>
  `;
}

function renderSeriesPreview(data) {
  const target = document.getElementById("series-preview");
  const countSeries = data.series.find(
    (series) =>
      series.disease === "astma" &&
      series.measure_code === "incidence" &&
      series.value_kind === "count"
  );
  const rateSeries = data.series.find(
    (series) =>
      series.disease === "astma" &&
      series.measure_code === "incidence" &&
      series.value_kind === "rate"
  );

  if (!countSeries || !rateSeries) {
    target.innerHTML = "<p>Expected asthma incidence preview series were not found.</p>";
    return;
  }

  const rows = countSeries.values.map((point, index) => {
    const rate = rateSeries.values[index];
    return `
      <tr>
        <td>${point.year}</td>
        <td>${point.value.toLocaleString()}</td>
        <td>${rate ? rate.value.toLocaleString() : ""}</td>
      </tr>
    `;
  }).join("");

  target.innerHTML = `
    <h3>National Asthma Incidence</h3>
    <p>This preview is rendered from the generated summary JSON served with the static site.</p>
    <table class="table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Year</th>
          <th>Count</th>
          <th>Rate per 100,000</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    </table>
  `;
}

async function initUsagePage() {
  const response = await fetch("site/data/latest-summary.json");
  const data = await response.json();
  renderDownloads(data);
  renderSeriesPreview(data);
}

initUsagePage().catch(() => {
  document.getElementById("download-links").innerHTML =
    "<p>Latest release links are not available yet.</p>";
  document.getElementById("series-preview").innerHTML =
    "<p>Example series preview is not available yet.</p>";
});
</script>
